feedback.text: I do not agree with games not being owned when bought, I have games since 2000, and I do not support any form of destruction or forced law that takes my games away from me. Suggesting games be left in a playable state. Ubisoft wants users to actively destroy their games even physical copies with forcing new laws in their EULA. Games are owned when bought, this should be simple. I'm sending this to support the initiative Stopkillinggames, and anything tied to users owning their games. Thanks!
